originalTitle: More die of suspected Ebola as WHO warns that numbers will rise further
title: More die of suspected Ebola as WHO warns that numbers will rise further
content: In its latest update, the World Health Organization says there have now been 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases.

originalTitle: Nigeria arrests former minister in hiding after corruption conviction
title: Nigeria arrests former minister in hiding after corruption conviction
content: The former power minister was sentenced to 75 years in jail in absentia earlier this month.

title: 'Ebola has tortured us': Fear grips eastern DR Congo as deadly virus spreads
content: The health minister has acknowledged that medics are playing catch-up with the virus after being slow to detect it.

title: New York City hotels avert labour strike threat before FIFA World Cup
content: Hotel operators avoid a 'very real threat' by signing a deal with 25,000 workers as the city hosts the 2026 tournament.

title: WHO says 600 suspected cases, 139 deaths in growing Ebola outbreak
content: Numbers are expected to rise, the WHO warns, as European officials emphasise the risk of a European outbreak is low.

title: Israeli lawmakers advance bill to dissolve parliament
content: Netanyahu is under mounting pressure as his fractious right-wing coalition submitted the bill to dissolve parliament.

originalTitle: Xi basks in spotlight as he hosts Putin days after Trump
title: Xi basks in spotlight as he hosts Putin days after Trump
content: Two presidential visits days apart is how Xi Jinping wants the world to see him: talking to everyone, tied to no-one.

title: Trump exerts iron grip on Republican Party with Massie defeated
content: Victory over a Republican rebel in Kentucky shows the president's strength but his power comes with risks for the midterms.

title: Saka calls out critics as players celebrate title at Emirates at 5am
content: Arsenal have had to wait 22 years to celebrate a title win, and both the club's players and fans made sure to savour every second of it.

originalTitle: A just or harsh punishment? Reaction to Southampton expulsion
title: A just or harsh punishment? Reaction to Southampton expulsion
content: Southampton will be playing in the Championship next season after they were expelled from the play-offs following their admission that they spied on three league rivals this season.
